# Bug: UX polish: tomoshibi uppercase prefix, progress IPC personality, ensure-ready banner

> Bug ID: FORGE-BUG-011
> Severity: major
> Status: 🔵 in-progress
> Reported: 2026-04-19

## Description

Three UX issues: (1) gh#51 tomoshibi emits /CAR: instead of /car: causing unknown command errors; (2) gh#52 progress IPC monitor events are bare pipe-delimited log lines lacking persona/emoji/context; (3) gh#54 ensure-ready.cjs multi-line banner collapses to single visible line in Claude Code inline display.
